message:
fix(audit_index): correct 4 wrong file paths + doctor/mod.rs bug count

- src/scenario.rs -> src/lab/scenario.rs
- src/combinator/timeout_future.rs -> src/time/timeout_future.rs
- src/reconnect.rs -> src/service/reconnect.rs
- src/snapshot.rs -> src/distributed/snapshot.rs
- doctor/mod.rs: bugs 4->3 (NaN bug was in scenario.rs, not doctor)

All 576 paths now verified to exist on disk.
